title: [MTR3/4]Victorian Trains
description: This resource pack adds Victorian State trains for Minecraft Transit Railway
body:
![Metro and V/Line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6af5fc55f4792ce32fdec950159304b888df4e6c.png)

## Introduction
This resource pack adds Victorian Trains for Minecraft Transit Railway Mod.

This pack requires **Minecraft Transit Railway Mod** (MTR3, MTR4) and Nemo's Transit Expansion for MTR3 version (NTE)

Compatible with [Non Standard Gauge Rail RP ](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/mtr1067mm_rail)

## Guide
This RP can be applied manually in the 'Resource Packs' page in the same way that other RPs are applied after Installing Required Mods and Addons.

Before using, please set the JVM arguments to 6GB or higher. It may take some time to load this RP.

MTR3 and MTR4 use different versions, and for MTR3, it is recommended to make appropriate number of the cars wrote below. (MTR4's formation isn't affected)

For MTR4, Train gauge is changed from 1,435mm to 1,600mm

## Contents
* V/Line Sprinter Railcar (Sound provided by Szandor)
* Metro Trains Melbourne Alstom X'trapolis EMU
* Metro Trains Melbourne Comeng Alstom Refurbished EMU
* Metro Trains Melbourne Siemens Nexas EMU
